title: SPF Generator
helpOutput:
Usage: spf-generator [<options>]

  Generate an SPF record from selected mechanisms.

Options:
  --json                Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>   DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>   Query timeout in seconds
  -i, --include=<text>  Include domain (can be repeated)
  --ip4=<text>          Allowed IPv4 address or CIDR (can be repeated)
  --ip6=<text>          Allowed IPv6 address or CIDR (can be repeated)
  --mx=<text>           Allow domain's MX servers
  --a=<text>            Allow domain's A record
  --redirect=<text>     Redirect to another domain's SPF
  --all=<text>          Policy for 'all' mechanism: fail(-all), softfail(~all),
                        neutral(?all), pass(+all)
  -h, --help            Show this message and exit
output:
{
  "SPF Record": "v\u003dspf1 include:_spf.google.com ip4:203.0.113.0/24 ~all",
  "DNS Lookups": "1 / 10",
  "Record Length": "54 chars"
}

TXT Record Value:
"v=spf1 include:_spf.google.com ip4:203.0.113.0/24 ~all"
